title: S.A.M Custom Status Effect
description: A mod-defined status effect with real engine mechanics. Registered into a reserved effect slot (135-159); applies flat attribute modifiers, a move-speed multiplier and per-second HP/MP deltas while active, and shows on the HUD. Apply it in-game via sam_apply_effect(player, "namespace:effect", ticks).

name.description: Display name shown on the HUD, e.g. "Frostbite".

tooltip.description: Short description shown in the effect's HUD tooltip.

icon.description: Optional mod-relative PNG for the HUD icon (a generic icon is used if omitted).

duration_ticks.description: Default duration in ticks (50 ticks = 1 second). 0 means the caller supplies the duration. sam_apply_effect's ticks argument overrides this.

stat_modifiers.description: Flat attribute modifiers applied while the effect is active (may be negative).

move_speed_mult.description: Move-speed multiplier while active. 1.0 = no change, 0.8 = 20% slower, 1.5 = 50% faster. Clamped by the engine's speed cap.

hp_per_second.description: HP change each second while active. Negative drains (can kill), positive heals. 0 = none.

mp_per_second.description: MP change each second while active. Negative drains, positive restores. 0 = none.

ac_mod.description: Flat armor (AC / defense) change while active. Positive hardens, negative exposes. 0 = none. (v1.5.0)

damage_mult.description: Multiplier on the wearer's outgoing MELEE weapon damage while active. 1.0 = no change, 1.5 = +50% (berserk), 0.5 = half (weakness). (v1.5.0)

grants.description: Vanilla status flags this effect also applies while active. They are re-asserted while it lasts and decay shortly after it ends. Allowlisted safe flags only. (v1.5.0)

hud_hidden.description: If true, the effect works but does not show an icon on the status bar.
